ddls:
CREATE TABLE "assets" (
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each asset */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the asset */,
  "slug" TEXT /* URL slug for the asset for SEO-friendly links */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Status indicating if the asset is active or not */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the asset was created or last updated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the user who uploaded the asset */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category the asset belongs to */,
  "asset_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of asset */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the uploaded file */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the uploaded file */,
  "file_extension" TEXT /* Extension of the uploaded file */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the asset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("asset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assets_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assets_asset_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_type_id") REFERENCES asset_types ("asset_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assets_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Role identifier for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user account was created */,
  "last_login_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last login */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category (for subcategories) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_categories_parent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the asset being commented on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the comment was made */,
  "parent_comment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent comment (for threaded comments) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_parent_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the asset that was changed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action taken (e.g., upload, update, delete) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the action was performed */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details about the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of permissions for the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "asset_types" (
  "asset_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each asset type */,
  "asset_type" TEXT /* Name of the asset type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the asset type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("asset_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "asset_tags" (
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the asset */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("asset_id", "tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the asset */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the collaboration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_metadata" (
  "image_metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image metadata entry */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the image asset */,
  "width" INTEGER /* Width of the image */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the image */,
  "resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_metadata_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_metadata" (
  "document_metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document metadata entry */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the document asset */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the document */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the document */,
  "pages" INTEGER /* Number of pages in the document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_metadata_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id")
)
